name: doc-convert
description: A mini-CLI tool for improving and enriching MyST Markdown-based technical and scientific content.

scripts.dev: bun run link && bun run copy:version && bun build src/index.ts --outfile=dist/doc-convert.cjs --target=node --format=cjs --minify=false --sourcemap=inline --watch
scripts.build:watch: bun run copy:version && bun build src/index.ts --outfile=dist/doc-convert.cjs --target=node --format=cjs --minify --sourcemap=inline --watch
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run copy:version && bun run build:cli
scripts.build:standalone: bun run copy:version && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/doc-convert
